runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - dashboard/AI parity rerun after ai-engine parity patch

expertAssessments.rationale: 배포 후 동일 질문에서 dashboard counts와 AI assistant summary가 다시 불일치했으므로 AI 품질 회귀가 직접 범위입니다.
expertAssessments.nextAction: AI sidebar/streaming summary 경로가 MetricsProvider와 동일한 status/average 기준선을 사용하도록 응답 생성 경로를 추적합니다.

expertAssessments.rationale: Cloud Run health는 정상이고 배포도 성공했지만 사용자-facing system summary가 운영 지표와 다르면 관측 결과를 신뢰할 수 없습니다.
expertAssessments.nextAction: stream/v2 최종 응답이 precomputed state summary와 어떤 경로에서 어긋나는지 trace/formatter 기준으로 재추적합니다.

usageChecks.summary: Production targeted QA 이후 billed 0.0000 USD, effective 1.9605 USD, unexpected billed spike 없음

artifacts.label: Dashboard and AI sidebar parity rerun

pendingImprovements.title: AI assistant summary must match dashboard and OTel-derived system counts
pendingImprovements.note: Commit 6130ac9c1 배포 후에도 dashboard는 online 14/offline 0, averages 35/47/32인데 AI sidebar는 online 13/offline 1, averages 32.5/44.1/31.6으로 응답했습니다.

notes: GitLab pipeline #147 (2429616075) finished success: validate_ai_engine, deploy_ai_engine, post_deploy_ai_engine_smoke all passed.
Vercel /api/version and Cloud Run /health both reported version 8.10.8 during this rerun.
Guest login with PIN 4231, system boot, and dashboard render all succeeded on production.
Dashboard counters showed total 15, online 14, warning 1, critical 0, offline 0 with system resource averages CPU 35%, memory 47%, disk 32%.
AI sidebar response to '현재 모든 서버의 상태를 요약해줘' still reported online 13, warning 1, critical 0, offline 1 and lower averages 32.5/44.1/31.6.
Cloud Run /monitoring and /monitoring/traces now require authentication; unauthenticated curl returned the expected auth error envelope.
This rerun confirms the issue is not a stale deployment problem but a remaining parity bug in the AI summary path.
